response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON incorrectly identified the song from 00:40 to 04:18 as 'Katahane', whereas the actual audio is 'Sekai de Ichiban no Idol' (世界で一番のアイドル). The lyrics and title of 'Tokusha Seizon Wonderladder!!' from 04:18 onwards were correct. 2. JSON Usage: The incorrect portion of the reference JSON was discarded, and 'Sekai de Ichiban no Idol' was transcribed entirely manually from the live audio performance. 'Wonderladder!!' lyrics were utilized as a helper reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are highly synchronized to the exact milliseconds of vocal activity. Song title card 'Sekai de Ichiban no Idol' was timed and displayed as an on-screen visual event during the silent introduction.

subtitles.original: 楽園
subtitles.english: Paradise...

subtitles.original: 永遠の
subtitles.english: Eternal...

subtitles.original: 楽園のそばで
subtitles.english: by the side of paradise...

subtitles.original: あー
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: きっといつか
subtitles.english: Surely, someday...

subtitles.original: でも
subtitles.english: but...

subtitles.original: あー
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: 遥か彼方
subtitles.english: Far, far away...

subtitles.original: 待って
subtitles.english: wait for me...

subtitles.original: 世界で一番のアイドル
subtitles.english: [Song: The Best Idol in the World]

subtitles.original: ふと思い出して 出会った日のこと
subtitles.english: Suddenly remembering the day we met...

subtitles.original: 手を取って 僕らの旅が始まった
subtitles.english: we took hands and our journey began.

subtitles.original: 走って転んで 涙を流しても
subtitles.english: Even if we run, fall, and shed tears...

subtitles.original: 気がつけば ほら 顔合わせて笑う
subtitles.english: before we know it, look, we face each other and laugh.

subtitles.original: 喜ぶ声が響いて 夢があふれだすね
subtitles.english: Joyful voices echo, and our dreams overflow!

subtitles.original: 君がいなきゃ だめなんだ
subtitles.english: Without you, it's no good.

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: One, two!

subtitles.original: 今 世界で一番幸せなアイドルだから
subtitles.english: Because now, I'm the happiest idol in the world...

subtitles.original: 世界で一番の笑顔をあげちゃう
subtitles.english: I'll give you the best smile in the world!

subtitles.original: 僕を見つけてくれた 愛してくれたから
subtitles.english: Because you found me and loved me...

subtitles.original: まだまだ終わらない ちゃんとついてきて
subtitles.english: it's not over yet, make sure to keep up with me!

subtitles.original: きらめく夢保存
subtitles.english: This sparkling dream...

subtitles.original: 肩叩いてゆく 背中を見送った
subtitles.english: Patting my shoulder, I watched your back leave.

subtitles.original: 雨上がり 君の傘を返したら
subtitles.english: Once the rain stopped, and I returned your umbrella...

subtitles.original: 手を引いて進もう 一緒にどこまでも
subtitles.english: let's take hands and move forward, together, wherever we go!

subtitles.original: 気がつけば ほら また前を向ける
subtitles.english: Before we know it, look, we can face forward again.

subtitles.original: 戯れ合う言葉の中にも 愛を感じています
subtitles.english: Even within our playful banter, I can feel the love.

subtitles.original: 僕じゃなきゃ だめなんでしょ？
subtitles.english: It has to be me, right?

subtitles.original: でしょ！
subtitles.english: Right!

subtitles.original: 今 世界で一番幸せなアイドルだから
subtitles.english: Because now, I'm the happiest idol in the world...

subtitles.original: 世界で一番のときめきをあげちゃう
subtitles.english: I'll give you the greatest heartbeat in the world!

subtitles.original: 僕を支えてくれた 推してくれたから
subtitles.english: Because you supported me and pushed for me...

subtitles.original: まだまだ終わらない 隣にいてよ
subtitles.english: it's not over yet, stay by my side!

subtitles.original: 自信なんかない 不安ばかりだった
subtitles.english: I had no confidence, only anxieties.

subtitles.original: 「もうやめよう」って泣いた日もあった
subtitles.english: There were days when I cried, saying "Let's stop already."

subtitles.original: そんな時浮かんでくるの みんなの声が保存
subtitles.english: In those times, what comes to mind is everyone's voices!

subtitles.original: 今までで一番あきらめたくないの
subtitles.english: This is what I want to give up on the least of all...

subtitles.original: ずっとなりたかった 最強のアイドル
subtitles.english: the strongest idol that I've always wanted to be!

subtitles.original: 今 世界で一番幸せなアイドルだから
subtitles.english: Because now, I'm the happiest idol in the world...

subtitles.original: 世界で一番の「大好き」をあげちゃう
subtitles.english: I'll give you the biggest "I love you" in the world!

subtitles.original: 些細な日常も もっと輝かせて
subtitles.english: Make even our trivial daily lives shine brighter...

subtitles.original: まだまだ終わらない ありふれた奇跡を
subtitles.english: it's not over yet, this commonplace miracle...

subtitles.original: 君と結んでいく
subtitles.english: I'll weave it together with you.

subtitles.original: いくよー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: ハイハイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah!

subtitles.original: なぬっ!? ビシッ おりゃっ! パシッ
subtitles.english: What!? Bam! Bam! Smash!

subtitles.original: ツッコミも冴えて 本日快晴
subtitles.english: My comedic retort is sharp today too, it's clear weather!

subtitles.original: ボロ、ユー、ム、バキッ
subtitles.english: Vol-ume, crash!

subtitles.original: 手にする全部 It’s mine! くれくれ
subtitles.english: Everything I get my hands on, It's mine! Gimme gimme!

subtitles.original: 適度にがんばろっか (そっか？)
subtitles.english: Should we try working hard moderately? (Is that so?)

subtitles.original: そんなんだっていいけどさ
subtitles.english: That's fine too, but...

subtitles.original: 必死にがんばろっか (そうだ！)
subtitles.english: should we try working hard desperately? (Yeah!)

subtitles.original: それが僕らしいよな
subtitles.english: That's more like me, isn't it?
